---
title: "Untitled"
output: html_document
date: "2026-06-18"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
llibrary(Seurat)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(grid)

genes_plot <- c("CCN1", "FGF7", "GDF15")

groups_use <- c("PT_NEWBORN", "FT_NEWBORN", "PT_BPD")

celltypes_use <- c(
  "AT2",
  "Fibroblasts",
  "Myofibroblasts",
  "Smooth Muscle",
  "Trans-AT2"
)

meta <- obj@meta.data
meta$CellType_Plot <- meta$predicted.ann_finest_level

meta$CellType_Plot <- recode(
  meta$CellType_Plot,
  "AT2" = "AT2",
  "Alveolar fibroblasts" = "Fibroblasts",
  "Myofibroblasts" = "Myofibroblasts",
  "Smooth muscle" = "Smooth Muscle",
  "Transitional Club-AT2" = "Trans-AT2"
)

expr_mat <- GetAssayData(
  obj,
  assay = "RNA",
  layer = "data"
)

cells_keep <- rownames(meta)[
  meta$Donor_Group %in% groups_use &
    meta$CellType_Plot %in% celltypes_use
]

meta_sub <- meta[cells_keep, ]

all_results <- list()

for (gene in genes_plot) {
  
  df <- meta_sub
  df$Gene <- gene
  df$Expression <- as.numeric(expr_mat[gene, rownames(df)])
  df$Positive <- df$Expression > 0
  
  donor_avg <- df %>%
    group_by(Gene, Donor_Group, Donor, CellType_Plot) %>%
    summarise(
      Total_Cells = n(),
      Positive_Cells = sum(Positive),
      Fraction_Positive = Positive_Cells / Total_Cells,
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    group_by(Gene, Donor_Group, CellType_Plot) %>%
    summarise(
      Mean_Fraction_Positive = mean(Fraction_Positive),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  
  all_results[[gene]] <- donor_avg
}

plot_data <- bind_rows(all_results)

plot_data$Donor_Group <- factor(
  plot_data$Donor_Group,
  levels = groups_use,
  labels = c("PT-NB", "FT-NB", "BPD")
)

plot_data$CellType_Plot <- factor(
  plot_data$CellType_Plot,
  levels = celltypes_use
)

celltype_colors <- c(
  "AT2" = "#4B2E83",
  "Fibroblasts" = "#1F6AE5",
  "Myofibroblasts" = "#0F8797",
  "Smooth Muscle" = "#FF6A00",
  "Trans-AT2" = "#FF3300"
)

write.csv(
  plot_data,
  "CCN1_FGF7_GDF15_DonorAveraged_CellFraction_SourceData.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

p <- ggplot(
  plot_data,
  aes(
    x = Donor_Group,
    y = Mean_Fraction_Positive,
    fill = CellType_Plot
  )
) +
  geom_bar(
    stat = "identity",
    width = 0.65,
    color = "#F2CFCF",
    linewidth = 1
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~Gene, nrow = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = celltype_colors, drop = FALSE) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Cell Proportion",
    fill = NULL
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(
      face = "bold",
      size = 18,
      color = "#005B8E"
    ),
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      angle = 45,
      hjust = 1,
      face = "bold",
      size = 14
    ),
    axis.text.y = element_text(
      face = "bold",
      size = 13
    ),
    axis.title.y = element_text(
      face = "bold",
      size = 16
    ),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.text = element_text(
      size = 18,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    legend.title = element_blank()
  ) +
  guides(
    fill = guide_legend(
      nrow = 1,
      byrow = TRUE,
      keywidth = unit(1.2, "cm"),
      keyheight = unit(0.8, "cm")
    )
  )

print(p)

ggsave(
  "CCN1_FGF7_GDF15_DonorAveraged_StackedBars.pdf",
  p,
  width = 10,
  height = 5.5
)

ggsave(
  "CCN1_FGF7_GDF15_DonorAveraged_StackedBars.png",
  p,
  width = 10,
  height = 5.5,
  dpi = 300
)
